# Martin Sulak Portfolio

> Official portfolio of Martin Šulák, an Artificial Intelligence student and software developer focused on web development, AI/ML projects, control systems, IoT, and engineering work.

Canonical URL: https://martinsulak.dev/
English URL: https://martinsulak.dev/?lang=en
Primary language: Slovak
Secondary language: English
Author: Martin Šulák
GitHub: https://github.com/martin18f
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/martin-šulak-bb9529231

## Site Summary

This site is a personal technical portfolio. It presents Martin Šulák's profile, skills, education, certificates, contact form, and selected projects across web development, artificial intelligence, machine learning, control systems, IoT, MATLAB/Simulink, Python, JavaScript, React, Java, C, MySQL, Git, and GitHub.

## Important Sections

- Profile: https://martinsulak.dev/#profil
- Technical skills: https://martinsulak.dev/#skills
- Web, AI/ML and engineering projects: https://martinsulak.dev/#projekty
- Artificial Intelligence education: https://martinsulak.dev/#vzdelanie
- Certifications and courses: https://martinsulak.dev/#certifikaty
- Contact form: https://martinsulak.dev/#kontakt

## Highlighted Projects

- PP AUTO: dealership website for vehicle presentation and customer contact.
- Autoškola Roka: driving school website for services, courses, and public contact information.
- Fuely: React web application for fuel cost calculation.
- Desktop Web Widget: Windows application for pinning interactive web content to the desktop.
- Speech Stress Detection: academic neural-network project for speech-based stress detection.
- UAV Control System: MATLAB/Simulink control systems project with fuzzy logic control.
- Machine Learning Project: academic ML implementation and evaluation work.

## Preferred Description

Martin Šulák is an AI student and software developer building web applications, AI/ML experiments, IoT and control-system projects, and technical documentation.
